footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ LegalEase provides summaries for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified lawyer for legal advice.

auth.errorFields: Please enter your email and password.
auth.errorLogin: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

landing.heroSubtitle: Upload any legal document in any language and get an instant AI summary, risk analysis, and key terms in your preferred language — without needing a lawyer or a law degree.
landing.checks: ✅ Free to use   ✅ No credit card   ✅ Instant results
landing.howItWorksSub: Get your legal document analyzed in 3 simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds — no credit card needed.
landing.step2Desc: Drag and drop your legal document into LegalEase.
landing.step3Desc: Our AI analyzes it and gives you a complete, easy-to-read summary in under 30 seconds.
landing.featuresSub: LegalEase gives you everything to understand your legal documents
landing.feat1Desc: Rental agreements, employment contracts, NDAs, Terms & Conditions, loan agreements — we handle them all.
landing.feat2Desc: Upload documents in any language. Get analysis in your preferred language from 20+ options.
landing.feat3Desc: Our AI reads the entire document and creates a plain-language summary anyone can understand in seconds.
landing.feat4Desc: Automatically identifies risky or one-sided clauses and explains exactly what they mean for you.
landing.feat5Desc: Instantly pulls out important details like deadlines, penalties, notice periods, and payment amounts.
landing.feat6Desc: All your analyzed documents are saved securely so you can revisit them anytime.
landing.feat7Desc: Your documents are processed securely. We never share or sell your data.
landing.disclaimerBox: Important Disclaimer: LegalEase provides AI-generated summaries for informational purposes only. This is not legal advice. Always consult a qualified lawyer before signing any legal document.
landing.ctaSub: Join thousands of people who use LegalEase to protect themselves.

upload.title: Analyze Your Legal Document
upload.subtitle: Upload any PDF in any language and get an instant AI-powered summary in your preferred language with risk analysis.
upload.tip1: Works best with text-based PDFs (not scanned images)
upload.tip2: Analysis takes 15–30 seconds depending on document length
upload.tip3: Your document is processed securely and never shared
upload.outputLangDesc: Choose the language you want the analysis results in. The document can be in any language.
upload.dropzoneAI: AI is analyzing your document... This may take 15-30 seconds.
upload.dontClose: Please do not close this page
upload.errorLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
upload.errorType: Only PDF, Word, and Image files are accepted.

result.summaryReminder: ⚠️ Reminder: This summary is AI-generated for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified lawyer before signing any legal document.
result.riskNoMajorDesc: This document appears to be relatively standard. Still, consult a lawyer if unsure.
result.riskFound: 🔍 Found {{count}} clauses that need your attention. Review each carefully before signing.
result.termsEmpty: No key terms were extracted from this document.
result.chatWelcome: Hi! I am your AI Lexical assistant. What would you like to know about this specific document?
